verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, mi thahna tawh a kidim khuapi tungah thukhen dingin na kiging nai hiam? A gamtat hoihlohna khempeuh tua khuapi kiangah gen in
Topa Pasian in hih bangin ci hi, ci-in gen in: Nangma mite mahmah tampi tak thatin, milim biakna tawh nangmah kininsaktawm na hih manin, tu-in na hun hong tungta hi

Na mi thahna hang leh na milim bawlna hangin a mawh suak na hih manin tu-in nang-a' dingin a ni cingin, a kha cingta hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte' simmawhbawl, gamdang khempeuh' hih thopthopin nang kong koih hi
A nai, a gamla-ah a om mi khempeuh in na gamtat hoihlohna hangin nang hong simmawh uh hi
Na sunga om Israel ulian khempeuh in amau' thatang muang uh a, mi that uh hi
A nu a pa a zahtakbawl kuamah omlo hi. Pemtate kikhemgawp a, meigong leh tagahte zong kihih thopthop hi
Mun siangthote zong zahtakna mel kinei loin, Sabbath-te zong kitanglo hi
Mi pawlkhatte in midangte a sih theihna dingin zuauthu phuak uh hi. Mi pawlkhat in milim biakna sa ne uh hi. Pawlkhatte amau' lanna tawh kizui-in gamta tawntung hi
Pawlkhatte in a pa' zi mawhpih uh a, pawlkhatte in numei ninnei kimlaipi buan uh hi
Pawlkhat in midangte' zi tawh nulepa mawhna bawl uh a, pawlkhat in a mote mawhpihin, pawlkhat in a sanggamnu ahi a pa' tanu mawhpih hi

Pawlkhat in sum deih manin mi that uh hi. Pawlkhatte in a Israel mipih sum leitawi a late tungah nuamtak sa-in a meet lakna tawh hauhlawh uh hi. Amaute in kei hong mangngilh uh hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi
“A manloin mi' na na suhna leh mi na thahna hangin ka khuttum ka zial ding hi
Tua bangin kong hih ciangin hang nawn dingin ki-um a, na khuttum likngam lai dingin ki-um na hi hiam? Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen khin a, ka gen bangin ka gamta ding hi
Gam khempeuh leh minam dang khempeuh lakah na mite ka thehthang gawp ding a, na gamtat hoihlohna teng ka beisak ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin minam dangte in nang hong mindaisak ding a, ahi zongin nang Jerusalem in Topa ka hihna thu na hong thei ding hi,” a hong ci hi.
Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a

“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, kei-a' dingin Israel mite a kiman'na om nawnlo hi. Amaute pen sumngo, dal, sik, hak, leh ngun a kihelkhawm sung panin meikhuk sungah kihalin a ngunteng a kilak khit ciangin a omlai ngun-ek tawh kibang uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa Pasian ahi keimah in ka genin-ah: Note, tua ngun-ek bangin na kiman'na uh om nawnlo ahih manin Jerusalem-ah kong kaikhawm ding hi
Mite in ngun, sumngo, sik, hak, leh dalte kaikhawmin a tuisak dingun meikhuk sungah a khul bangin ka hehna tawh note hong kaikhawmin kong tuisuaksak mang ding hi
Jerusalem-ah note hong khawm takpi-in na nuai uhah mei tawhin, ka hehna tawh kong haltui ding hi
Meiphual sungah ngunte a kituisak bangin Jerusalem-ah note hong kibawl ding hi. Tua ciangin keima hehna a thuak na hihlam uh na thei ding uh hi,” a hong ci hi.
Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Israel mite pen ka hehna hangin puahloin, a tungah guah ka zuksaklohna leitang tawh a kibatna uh amaute kiangah gen in
A uliante uh, ganhing a that humpinelkai hawk tawh kibang uh hi. Amaute in mi thatin, a sum leh a neihsa khempeuh laksak uh a, a mi thahna hangun numei tampi tak meigong suaksak uh hi

A siampite un ka thukham palsatin, a siangtho biakna nate ninsak uh hi. A siangtho biakna nate leh a mawkmawk nate khenna mel neilo uh a, a tate uh tungah a siang leh a nin a kilamdan'na zong hilhlo uh hi. Sabbath-te zong donin neilo uh hi. Tuate khempeuh hangin Israel mite in kei hong zahtaklo uh hi
A kumpi uliante uh, a sa matsa uh a balgawpgawp ngiahon tawh kibang uh hi. Sum ngahtheihna dingin mi that uh hi

Kulh nin kimlai leikang tui tawh a kizut kang bangin a kamsangte un hih bang mawhnate imcip uh hi. A manlopi maang mu uh a, a manlopi-in mailam thu gen uh hi. Topa ahi keimah in amaute tungah thu genlo napi-in, Topa Pasian in hih bangin thu gen hi, ci-in zuau phuakin mite tungah thu gen uh hi
Mi cithei-a kineite in mi khemin a na sut uh hi. Mizawng mi cimawhte bawlsia-in, pemtate tungah nuamtak sa-in khualna mel neiloin a ut utun gamta uh hi

Keimah in ka hehna tawh ka suksiat ding hun ciangin kulh a ciangzo ding, kulh a kicipna munah a cingzo ding, leh gamsung a huzo ding mi khat amaute lakah ka zong a, ahi zongin tua bang ding mi khat beek ka muzo kei hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute' gamtatna tawh kizui-in gimpiakna-in amaute tungah ka hehna khahin, mei in a kat bangin amaute ka maimangsak ding hi, Topa Pasian in ci hi,” a hong ci hi.
